chatgpt.name: ChatGPT
chatgpt.optimization_notes: Prefers comprehensive guides with expert quotes and statistics. +40% citation boost with author credentials.

perplexity.name: Perplexity AI
perplexity.optimization_notes: 3.2x citation rate with fresh content (updated within 30 days). Prefers structured H2->H3->bullet format.

google_ai_overview.name: Google AI Overview
google_ai_overview.optimization_notes: +13% coverage with FAQ Schema and data tables. Direct answer within first 150 chars critical.

gemini.name: Google Gemini
gemini.optimization_notes: Strong Google ecosystem integration needed. Values knowledge graph and schema data.

claude.name: Claude (Anthropic)
claude.optimization_notes: Values balanced analysis, diverse sources, clear reasoning chains.
